fixtures.prompt: Draft and assemble a complete consulting proposal response to this tender
Write the bid cover letter, not the executive summary
Draft the evaluator-facing executive summary, not the cover letter
Develop the technical approach and methodology with phases, deliverables and acceptance
Prepare the separate financial proposal price schedule and fee assumptions, not the work plan
Respond to a GIZ AVB local procurement tender with separate technical and financial zip folders
Propose a retail omnichannel transformation covering POS, merchandising, promotions, fulfilment and shrink
Design a multi-tenant SaaS implementation methodology without AI agents
Create a three-plane AI-on-SaaS methodology for RAG and copilots in a multi-tenant product
Propose an autonomous AI agent methodology with action catalogue, shadow mode, kill switch and supervised autonomy
Draft agent SLA classes, task-success measures, intervention credits and service credit schedule
Select the proposer identity and voice but stop if the company or consultant profile is missing
Prepare a Uganda PPDA procurement response under the 2023 regulations
Prevent generic AI slop while drafting even when external verification is unavailable
Audit this completed proposal section for AI slop in read-only mode and grade it A B C or F
Build the proposal strategy and costing for a website redesign, SEO and content migration
Stress-test proposal feasibility, assumptions, countercase, business logic and achievability
Polish proposal copy for evaluator clarity and commercial proof without changing the strategy
